author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو القاسم عبد الملك بن محمد بن عبد الله بن بشْران بن محمد بن بشْران بن مهران البغدادي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent hadith scholar and transmitter from Baghdad, known for his reliability and extensive narrations.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: Part of the broader tradition of hadith compilation and transmission in the Islamic scholarly heritage.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Represents a specific transmission chain (riwayah) of hadith, contributing to the preservation of prophetic traditions.
